name: EC Economic Sentiment Indicator (EA)
notes: §2.A A12 (2026-07-09) — direct Eurostat dissemination-API re-source of the DG ECFIN ESI composite, replacing the frozen DB.nomics mirror (Eurostat provider last converted 2026-01-22) whose EA20 slice was also discontinued when Bulgaria joined the euro 2026-01-01. Geo bumped EA20→EA21 ("Euro area – 21 countries (from 2026)", back-recomputed to 1980-01). >100 = above-average confidence. Verified live via adapter 2026-07-09: 558 obs 1980-01 → 2026-06 = 95.0 (updated 2026-06-29). Feeds EU_NOWCAST1.

name: EC Industry Confidence (EA)
notes: §2.A A12 (2026-07-09) — direct Eurostat dissemination-API re-source of the DG ECFIN industrial-confidence sub-indicator (balance of positive minus negative responses), replacing the frozen DB.nomics EA20 mirror. Geo EA21 (post-2026 euro-area aggregate). Verified live via adapter 2026-07-09: 558 obs 1980-01 → 2026-06 = -7.7 (updated 2026-06-29). Feeds EU_NOWCAST1.

name: EC Services Confidence (EA)
notes: §2.A A12 (2026-07-09) — direct Eurostat dissemination-API re-source of the DG ECFIN services-confidence sub-indicator (balance of positive minus negative responses), replacing the frozen DB.nomics EA20 mirror. Geo EA21 (post-2026 euro-area aggregate). Verified live via adapter 2026-07-09: 375 obs 1995-04 → 2026-06 = 3.2 (updated 2026-06-29). Feeds EU_NOWCAST1.

name: Eurozone Producer Prices (PPI, total industry ex-construction)
notes: §2.B B3 (2026-07-14) — Eurozone industrial producer prices (PPI), total industry ex-construction (NACE B-E36), Eurostat sts_inpp_m via the direct dissemination API (sources/eurostat.py — the DB.nomics Eurostat mirror is frozen since 2026-01-22 per §2.A A12, so wired direct). Index 2021=100, NSA. geo=EA21 confirmed the current euro-area aggregate (Bulgaria joined 2026-01; EA20 now frozen '2023-2025', EA21 back-recomputed to 2000-01 — same A12 lesson). Dimension tuple validated via the DB.nomics frozen mirror 2026-07-14 (n=311 2000-01→2025-11=120.9); the live direct-API fetch (with 2026 obs) validates on the first daily CI run — ec.europa.eu egress was unavailable in the wiring session. YoY derivable downstream (Eurostat unit PCH_SM also exists).

name: Eurozone Building Permits (floor area, all buildings, SCA)
notes: §2.B B2 (2026-07-14) — Eurozone building permits, m2 of useful floor area, all buildings (CPA_F41001_41002), seasonally+calendar adjusted, Eurostat sts_cobp_m via the direct dissemination API (sources/eurostat.py; DB.nomics mirror frozen per §2.A A12). Index 2021=100, SCA. Construction leading indicator, sister to EZ_IND_PROD. geo=EA21 (current euro-area aggregate, A12 lesson). Dimension tuple validated via the DB.nomics frozen mirror 2026-07-14 (n=249 2005-01→2025-09=85.2); the live direct-API fetch validates on the first daily CI run — ec.europa.eu egress was unavailable in the wiring session.
